criteria.growth_sweet: EPS growth (TTM vs prior TTM) between 10% and 40% — fast but sustainable (Lynch)
criteria.peg_ok: PEG (P/E divided by EPS growth) at or below 1.5
criteria.rev_confirms: Revenue growth at least 5% — earnings growth backed by real sales
criteria.debt_ok: Long-term debt / equity at or below 1.0 (skipped for Financials)
